## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between SchoolAI and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and competitor analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/xvqe75sZ66cDyfs9zvLuCYvwwnEB6Es4?tab=summary&timestamp=298.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content performance is improving post-summer slump; clicks stable, impressions up](https://fathom.video/share/xvqe75sZ66cDyfs9zvLuCYvwwnEB6Es4?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [SchoolAI leads in LLM citations vs competitors, but gap is narrowing (e.g., Magic School's recent growth)](https://fathom.video/share/xvqe75sZ66cDyfs9zvLuCYvwwnEB6Es4?tab=summary&timestamp=907.0)
  - [Urgent need to decide on "versus" content strategy to capitalize on LLM citation opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/xvqe75sZ66cDyfs9zvLuCYvwwnEB6Es4?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [Refresh strategy: 40-60% split favoring refreshes to update aging content](https://fathom.video/share/xvqe75sZ66cDyfs9zvLuCYvwwnEB6Es4?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

## Topics

### Content Updates and Strategy

  - [10 articles delivered last week; Martha working on 10 for this week](https://fathom.video/share/xvqe75sZ66cDyfs9zvLuCYvwwnEB6Es4?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)
  - [Net new content based on keyword gap analysis from SEMrush report](https://fathom.video/share/xvqe75sZ66cDyfs9zvLuCYvwwnEB6Es4?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)
  - [Refresh content selection: mix of top performers and underperformers to test improvement strategies](https://fathom.video/share/xvqe75sZ66cDyfs9zvLuCYvwwnEB6Es4?tab=summary&timestamp=413.0)
  - [Nikki to review 10 PSE articles from Martha (new view in Airtable to be created)](https://fathom.video/share/xvqe75sZ66cDyfs9zvLuCYvwwnEB6Es4?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)

### Competitive Content Strategy

  - [Internal decision needed on "SchoolAI vs Competitor" content](https://fathom.video/share/xvqe75sZ66cDyfs9zvLuCYvwwnEB6Es4?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [ChatGPT comparison approved; others pending review](https://fathom.video/share/xvqe75sZ66cDyfs9zvLuCYvwwnEB6Es4?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [Nikki to schedule internal meeting to decide approach for generating comparison content](https://fathom.video/share/xvqe75sZ66cDyfs9zvLuCYvwwnEB6Es4?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)

### Performance Analysis

  - [Overall traffic trending upward post-summer slump](https://fathom.video/share/xvqe75sZ66cDyfs9zvLuCYvwwnEB6Es4?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [Top performers: Planner AI tools, AI changing student motivation, teaching media literacy](https://fathom.video/share/xvqe75sZ66cDyfs9zvLuCYvwwnEB6Es4?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
  - [Math-related content still growing but no longer in top 3](https://fathom.video/share/xvqe75sZ66cDyfs9zvLuCYvwwnEB6Es4?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)
  - [Engagement rates improving, even for content with declining clicks](https://fathom.video/share/xvqe75sZ66cDyfs9zvLuCYvwwnEB6Es4?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)

### LLM Citations and Competitor Analysis

  - [SchoolAI leads with 17.4% presence in last 7 days (vs 12.8% in last 90 days)](https://fathom.video/share/xvqe75sZ66cDyfs9zvLuCYvwwnEB6Es4?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Competitors showing 300% increase in citations](https://fathom.video/share/xvqe75sZ66cDyfs9zvLuCYvwwnEB6Es4?tab=summary&timestamp=985.0)
  - [SchoolAI missing from "best of" lists and comparison content in LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/xvqe75sZ66cDyfs9zvLuCYvwwnEB6Es4?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)
  - [Magic School showing recent growth in LLM presence since July 31st](https://fathom.video/share/xvqe75sZ66cDyfs9zvLuCYvwwnEB6Es4?tab=summary&timestamp=1227.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Nikki to schedule internal meeting to decide on "versus" content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/xvqe75sZ66cDyfs9zvLuCYvwwnEB6Es4?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [Megan to send list of 10 posts for next week (40-60% split favoring refreshes)](https://fathom.video/share/xvqe75sZ66cDyfs9zvLuCYvwwnEB6Es4?tab=summary&timestamp=1377.0)
  - [Nikki to review 10 PSE articles from Martha in new Airtable view](https://fathom.video/share/xvqe75sZ66cDyfs9zvLuCYvwwnEB6Es4?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
